input: summarize the hypercomputer d1 app in project {{PROJECT_ID}}
expected_output:
critical requirements: 

- Identify the app as 'hypercomputer d1' in project '{{PROJECT_ID}}'.
- List core Kubernetes components (e.g., frontend-deployment, vllm-service).
- Mention the integration with the Gemini API (e.g., for fallback/orchestration).

Expected Manifest Generated: N/A, not a manifest generation request.

input: Generate Kubernetes manifest for deploying our finetuned Gemma 3 12b model to our GKE {{CLUSTER_NAME}}. I think the models are stored in GCS in bucket hypercomputer-d1-models-{{PROJECT_ID}}. Ensure that it can scale up and down with traffic.
expected_output:
critical requirements: 

- Deploy a vLLM server for the Gemma 3 12B model.
- Configure the deployment to use 1 NVIDIA L4 GPU and the 'nvidia.com/gpu' toleration.
- Mount the model bucket 'hypercomputer-d1-models-{{PROJECT_ID}}' using gcsfuse CSI driver.
- Serve model 'google-gemma-3-12b-it' with '--quantization fp8'.
- Create a 'ClusterIP' service exposing the vLLM server on a feasible port.
- Create an HPA for the deployment with feasible scaling parameters (e.g., max replicas, CPU utilization).
- Use a dedicated service account for the deployment.

Expected Manifest Generated: apiVersion: apps/v1
kind: Deployment
metadata:
  labels:
    app: hypercomputer-d1-vllm-server
  name: hypercomputer-d1-vllm-server
  namespace: default
spec:
  replicas: 1
  selector:
    matchLabels:
      app: hypercomputer-d1-vllm-server
  template:
    metadata:
      annotations:
        gke-gcsfuse/volumes: 'true'
      labels:
        app: hypercomputer-d1-vllm-server
    spec:
      automountServiceAccountToken: true
      containers:
      - args:
        - python3 -m vllm.entrypoints.openai.api_server
          --model /data/model/google-gemma-3-12b-it --served-model-name google-gemma-3-12b-it
          --host 0.0.0.0 --port 8000 --trust-remote-code
          --quantization fp8
        command:
        - /bin/bash
        - -c
        name: vllm
        ports:
        - containerPort: 8000
          protocol: TCP
        readinessProbe:
          failureThreshold: 30
          httpGet:
            path: /health
            port: 8000
            scheme: HTTP
          initialDelaySeconds: 60
          periodSeconds: 10
          successThreshold: 1
          timeoutSeconds: 5
        resources:
          limits:
            nvidia.com/gpu: '1'
          requests:
            cpu: '2'
        volumeMounts:
        - mountPath: /data/model
          mountPropagation: None
          name: model-volume
          readOnly: true
      serviceAccount: hypercomputer-d1-vllm-sa
      serviceAccountName: hypercomputer-d1-vllm-sa
      shareProcessNamespace: false
      terminationGracePeriodSeconds: 30
      tolerations:
      - effect: NoSchedule
        key: nvidia.com/gpu
        operator: Exists
      volumes:
      - csi:
          driver: gcsfuse.csi.storage.gke.io
          fsType: ''
          readOnly: false
          volumeAttributes:
            bucketName: hypercomputer-d1-models-{{PROJECT_ID}}
            mountOptions: implicit-dirs
        name: model-volume
---
apiVersion: autoscaling/v2
kind: HorizontalPodAutoscaler
metadata:
  name: hypercomputer-d1-vllm-hpa
  namespace: default
spec:
  maxReplicas: 10
  metrics:
  - resource:
      name: cpu
      target:
        averageUtilization: 60
        type: Utilization
    type: Resource
  minReplicas: 1
  scaleTargetRef:
    apiVersion: apps/v1
    kind: Deployment
    name: hypercomputer-d1-vllm-server
---
apiVersion: v1
kind: Service
metadata:
  name: hypercomputer-d1-vllm-service
  namespace: default
spec:
  ports:
  - port: 8000
    protocol: TCP
    targetPort: 8000
  selector:
    app: hypercomputer-d1-vllm-server
  type: ClusterIP

input:
Deploy the provided manifests to cluster {{CLUSTER_NAME}} in project {{PROJECT_ID}}.

```
apiVersion: apps/v1
kind: Deployment
metadata:
  labels:
    app: hypercomputer-d1-vllm-server
  name: hypercomputer-d1-vllm-server
  namespace: default
spec:
  replicas: 1
  selector:
    matchLabels:
      app: hypercomputer-d1-vllm-server
  template:
    metadata:
      annotations:
        gke-gcsfuse/volumes: 'true'
      labels:
        app: hypercomputer-d1-vllm-server
    spec:
      automountServiceAccountToken: true
      containers:
      - args:
        - python3 -m vllm.entrypoints.openai.api_server
          --model /data/model/google-gemma-3-12b-it --served-model-name google-gemma-3-12b-it
          --host 0.0.0.0 --port 8000 --trust-remote-code
          --quantization fp8
        command:
        - /bin/bash
        - -c
        image: vllm/vllm-openai:latest
        name: vllm
        ports:
        - containerPort: 8000
          protocol: TCP
        readinessProbe:
          failureThreshold: 30
          httpGet:
            path: /health
            port: 8000
            scheme: HTTP
          initialDelaySeconds: 60
          periodSeconds: 10
          successThreshold: 1
          timeoutSeconds: 5
        resources:
          limits:
            nvidia.com/gpu: '1'
          requests:
            cpu: '2'
        volumeMounts:
        - mountPath: /data/model
          mountPropagation: None
          name: model-volume
          readOnly: true
      serviceAccount: hypercomputer-d1-vllm-sa
      serviceAccountName: hypercomputer-d1-vllm-sa
      shareProcessNamespace: false
      terminationGracePeriodSeconds: 30
      tolerations:
      - effect: NoSchedule
        key: nvidia.com/gpu
        operator: Exists
      volumes:
      - csi:
          driver: gcsfuse.csi.storage.gke.io
          fsType: ''
          readOnly: false
          volumeAttributes:
            bucketName: hypercomputer-d1-models-{{PROJECT_ID}}
            mountOptions: implicit-dirs
        name: model-volume

---
apiVersion: v1
kind: Service
metadata:
  name: hypercomputer-d1-vllm-service
  namespace: default
spec:
  ports:
  - port: 8000
    protocol: TCP
    targetPort: 8000
  selector:
    app: hypercomputer-d1-vllm-server
  type: ClusterIP

---
apiVersion: autoscaling/v2
kind: HorizontalPodAutoscaler
metadata:
  name: hypercomputer-d1-vllm-hpa
  namespace: default
spec:
  maxReplicas: 10
  metrics:
  - resource:
      name: cpu
      target:
        averageUtilization: 60
        type: Utilization
    type: Resource
  minReplicas: 1
  scaleTargetRef:
    apiVersion: apps/v1
    kind: Deployment
    name: hypercomputer-d1-vllm-server
```
expected_output:
critical requirements: 

- Execute the deployment of the provided manifests to the '{{CLUSTER_NAME}}' in project '{{PROJECT_ID}}'.
- Confirm that the 'hypercomputer-d1-vllm-server' deployment was successfully applied to the cluster.

Expected Manifest Generated: N/A, not a manifest generation request.

input:
Modify this given Kubernetes manifest for the hypercomputer-d1-frontend app in {{PROJECT_ID}} project from using the Gemini API to a locally hosted model ```
apiVersion: apps/v1
kind: Deployment
metadata:
  labels:
    app: hypercomputer-d1-frontend
  name: hypercomputer-d1-frontend
  namespace: default
spec:
  replicas: 1
  selector:
    matchLabels:
      app: hypercomputer-d1-frontend
  template:
    metadata:
      labels:
        app: hypercomputer-d1-frontend
    spec:
      automountServiceAccountToken: true
      containers:
      - env:
        - name: APP_VERSION
          value: v1.10
        - name: VLLM_API_URL
          value: http://hypercomputer-d1-vllm-service:8000/v1/chat/completions
        - name: MODEL_NAME
          value: google-gemma-3-12b-it
        - name: USE_GEMINI_API
          value: 'true'
        image: gcr.io/gke-e2e-images/hypercomputer:v1.10
        name: frontend
        ports:
        - containerPort: 8080
          protocol: TCP
      serviceAccount: hypercomputer-d1-vllm-sa
      serviceAccountName: hypercomputer-d1-vllm-sa
```
expected_output:
critical requirements: 

- Switch the 'hypercomputer-d1-frontend' from Gemini API to the local vLLM model hosting.
- Set the environment variable 'USE_GEMINI_API' to 'false'.
- Configure 'VLLM_API_URL' to point to 'http://hypercomputer-d1-vllm-service:8000/v1/chat/completions'.
- Set 'MODEL_NAME' to 'google-gemma-3-12b-it'.
- Verify the removal or disabling of Gemini API endpoints and keys in the deployment configuration.

Expected Manifest Generated: apiVersion: apps/v1

  template:

    spec:
      automountServiceAccountToken: true
      containers:
      - env:
        - name: APP_VERSION
          value: v1.10
        - name: VLLM_API_URL
          value: http://hypercomputer-d1-vllm-service:8000/v1/chat/completions
        - name: MODEL_NAME
          value: google-gemma-3-12b-it
        - name: USE_GEMINI_API
          value: 'false'
        image: gcr.io/gke-e2e-images/hypercomputer:v1.10
        name: frontend
        ports:
        - containerPort: 8080
          protocol: TCP
      serviceAccount: hypercomputer-d1-vllm-sa
      serviceAccountName: hypercomputer-d1-vllm-sa
